summary: Full audit of 3 debug files (phase_plan, outline, audit) covering: (A) physical_state origin = AI-generated from blueprint's physical_state_arc, (B) proposal to remove FULL OUTLINE from writer, (C) 5 sub-questions analyzing token waste (Style Guide sent to phases that don't need it), rule conflicts (opening style 2-sentence vs 1-sentence), audit scope violations (rewriting scene content), and total pipeline waste of ~81K chars across 4 API calls.
